# Aiadverts — AI Advertising Agency

Aiadverts is South Africa's leading AI advertising agency, creating cinematic AI-generated video and image adverts for businesses across Durban, Johannesburg, Cape Town, Pietermaritzburg and all of South Africa. Delivery in 3–5 business days at roughly 70% less than traditional video production. A brand by Webafy (webafy.co.za).

## What We Do
We use proprietary AI technology to produce scroll-stopping video adverts, stunning product images and complete social media content — delivered in days at a fraction of traditional production costs. No cameras, studios or shoots needed — clients only supply product details and brand assets. A free demo advert is available before any payment.

## Services
- AI Video Adverts — cinematic product videos and brand films
- AI Image Adverts — professional product photography and brand imagery
- Social Media Management — complete monthly content management and AI-powered social media advertising

## Pricing
- Starter: R2,500 once-off — 1 AI video advert, 3 AI images, 2 revisions, delivered in 3–5 days
- Growth: R6,000/month — 3 AI video adverts, 10 AI images, weekly posting, monthly report
- Premium: R10,000/month — 7 AI video adverts, 20 AI images, full management, strategy session, priority support

## Key Facts
- Delivery in 3–5 business days
- No cameras, studios or shoots required — clients supply product details and brand assets only
- Free demo advert available before any payment commitment
- Around 70% cost saving vs traditional video production
- Clients include: True Organic (skincare), Sizzles Steakhouse (restaurants), Onikuma (gaming), Marcos Jewellers (luxury jewellery), Scentimental (fragrance), Cubed Coffee

## Location
Based in Durban, KwaZulu-Natal, South Africa.
Serving all of South Africa digitally — Durban, Johannesburg, Cape Town, Pietermaritzburg, Pretoria, Gqeberha, Bloemfontein and beyond.
